name: 4x4 Array Multiplier
description: A combinational 4x4 unsigned array multiplier (AND-array + full-adder tree), adapted from UACJ Group A's Tiny Tapeout Array-multiplier (Apache-2.0, commit f5291c9), taken spec -> lint -> sim -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 45 std cells; 0.28 mW
Exhaustive self-checking TB verifies all 256 products -- TEST PASSED
source_note: Multiplier RTL adapted from HHRB98/Array-multiplier (Apache-2.0); original exhaustive self-checking TB (all 256 products); authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally.
